'''Basarais''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], outside Basarais, a children’s counting rhyme was known that went, «If I had a fat toe, a short toe, a black toe, a new toe, I would know where to go».<ref name="SL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
